# M Park Sarajevo

> Multilingual private airport parking near Sarajevo Airport with online reservation, free airport transfer, secure fenced parking, CCTV, and customer reviews.

## Website

- [Bosnian homepage](https://www.mpark-sarajevo.com/bs) - Primary public homepage.
- [English homepage](https://www.mpark-sarajevo.com/en) - English public homepage.
- [German homepage](https://www.mpark-sarajevo.com/de) - German public homepage.

## Core pages

- [Parking prices](https://www.mpark-sarajevo.com/bs/cijene-parking-aerodrom-sarajevo) - Pricing and tariff details.
- [How parking works](https://www.mpark-sarajevo.com/bs/kako-funkcionise-parking-aerodrom-sarajevo) - Booking and transfer process.
- [Secure parking](https://www.mpark-sarajevo.com/bs/sigurnost-parking-sarajevo-aerodrom) - Security, fencing, and CCTV details.
- [Parking near Sarajevo Airport](https://www.mpark-sarajevo.com/bs/parking-blizu-aerodroma-sarajevo) - Location and access details.
- [Reservation](https://www.mpark-sarajevo.com/bs/rezervacija) - Online booking page.
- [Blog](https://www.mpark-sarajevo.com/bs/blog) - Guides and supporting content.
- [Privacy policy](https://www.mpark-sarajevo.com/bs/politika-privatnosti) - Privacy and data handling information.

## Notes

- Canonical public origin: `https://www.mpark-sarajevo.com`
- Localized routes are available under `/bs`, `/en`, and `/de`
- The site is built with Next.js and includes localized metadata, hreflang alternates, sitemap entries, and schema markup
